modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.

short_description_text: Inquiry about the Paint Format tool in Google Docs

full_description_text:  
The user is seeking clarification on the functionality of the Paint Format tool in Google Docs. They are interested in understanding how to effectively utilize this feature within the application. The inquiry suggests a need for guidance on its purpose and usage.
